item.title: vmware-labs / mod_wasm
item.description:
Desc: mod_wasm is an extension module for the Apache HTTP Server (httpd) that enables the usage of WebAssembly (Wasm). This module will allow to execute certain tasks in the backend in a very efficient and secure way.
Lang: Rust
Star: 30
